categories.label: Editing
categories.description: Changing work with reversible and destructive actions.

categories.label: Loops
categories.description: Continuous state while work, capture, or connection is active.

packs.name: organic

packs.description: Wood, water, breath, and small stones.

packs.name: dreamy
packs.label: Dreamy
packs.description: Airy blooms, soft light, and slow sparkle.

packs.name: scifi

packs.description: Clean holographic pings with a restrained digital shimmer.
packs.bestFor: AI tools, spatial UI, futuristic games

packs.name: rubber
packs.label: Rubber
packs.description: Tactile elastic taps with a quick, friendly rebound.

packs.name: cinematic
packs.label: Cinematic
packs.description: Deep impacts, polished tails, and quiet scale.

packs.name: studio

cues.name: hover
cues.label: Hover
cues.description: Fine-pointer discovery without commitment.

cues.name: press
cues.label: Press
cues.description: A control is physically engaged.

cues.name: release
cues.label: Release
cues.description: A pressed control springs back.

cues.name: double-click
cues.label: Double click
cues.description: A rapid secondary activation.

cues.name: focus
cues.label: Focus
cues.description: A control becomes ready for keyboard or text input.

cues.name: long-press
cues.label: Long press
cues.description: A sustained press reveals a secondary action.

cues.name: select
cues.label: Select
cues.description: An item enters the active set.

cues.name: deselect
cues.label: Deselect
cues.description: An item leaves the active set.

cues.name: toggle-on
cues.label: Toggle on
cues.description: A binary setting becomes active.

cues.name: toggle-off
cues.label: Toggle off
cues.description: A binary setting becomes inactive.

cues.name: check
cues.label: Check
cues.description: A checkbox or task enters its completed state.

cues.name: uncheck
cues.label: Uncheck
cues.description: A checkbox or task returns to its incomplete state.

cues.name: delete
cues.label: Delete
cues.description: A destructive removal is committed.

cues.name: cancel
cues.label: Cancel
cues.description: A pending action is abandoned without applying.

cues.name: undo
cues.label: Undo
cues.description: The most recent change is reversed.

cues.name: redo
cues.label: Redo
cues.description: A reversed change is applied again.

cues.name: copy
cues.label: Copy
cues.description: Selected content is placed on the clipboard.

cues.name: paste
cues.label: Paste
cues.description: Clipboard content is inserted into the current context.

cues.name: open
cues.label: Open
cues.description: A menu, sheet, panel, or detail view appears.

cues.name: close
cues.label: Close
cues.description: A menu, sheet, panel, or detail view recedes.

cues.name: back
cues.label: Back
cues.description: Navigation returns to the previous place.

cues.name: forward
cues.label: Forward
cues.description: Navigation advances to the next place.

cues.name: expand
cues.label: Expand
cues.description: A collapsed region reveals more detail.

cues.name: collapse
cues.label: Collapse
cues.description: An expanded region returns to its compact state.

cues.name: drag-start
cues.label: Drag start
cues.description: An object lifts from its resting place.

cues.name: drop
cues.label: Drop
cues.description: A dragged object lands in a valid target.

cues.name: snap
cues.label: Snap
cues.description: An object locks into a precise position.

cues.name: swipe
cues.label: Swipe
cues.description: A touch gesture moves content spatially.

cues.name: reorder
cues.label: Reorder
cues.description: An item settles into a new position in a sequence.

cues.name: invalid-drop
cues.label: Invalid drop
cues.description: A dragged object cannot land in the current target.

cues.name: send
cues.label: Send
cues.description: A message or object leaves the user.

cues.name: receive
cues.label: Receive
cues.description: A response or object arrives.

cues.name: notification
cues.label: Notification
cues.description: New information is available, without urgency.

cues.name: mention
cues.label: Mention
cues.description: The user is directly addressed.

cues.name: typing
cues.label: Typing
cues.description: A collaborator begins composing a response.

cues.name: reaction
cues.label: Reaction
cues.description: A lightweight social response is added.

cues.name: success
cues.label: Success
cues.description: An action finished with the expected result.

cues.name: error
cues.label: Error
cues.description: An action failed and needs attention.

cues.name: warning
cues.label: Warning
cues.description: A risky or consequential state needs review.

cues.name: info
cues.label: Info
cues.description: A neutral system fact is surfaced.

cues.name: blocked
cues.label: Blocked
cues.description: An action cannot continue in the current state.

cues.name: retry
cues.label: Retry
cues.description: A failed action is attempted again.

cues.name: start
cues.label: Start
cues.description: A process, recording, or session begins.

cues.name: stop
cues.label: Stop
cues.description: A process, recording, or session ends.

cues.name: progress-step
cues.label: Progress step
cues.description: A discrete step advances inside a longer process.

cues.name: complete
cues.label: Complete
cues.description: A multi-step process reaches its final state.

cues.name: queued
cues.label: Queued
cues.description: Work is accepted and waiting to begin.

cues.name: checkpoint
cues.label: Checkpoint
cues.description: A meaningful stage in a longer process is saved.

cues.name: loading
cues.label: Loading
cues.description: A quiet repeating pulse while an interface fetches or waits.

cues.name: processing
cues.label: Processing
cues.description: A restrained repeating bed while sustained work is running.

cues.name: recording
cues.label: Recording
cues.description: A calm periodic pulse while audio or video capture is live.

cues.name: connecting
cues.label: Connecting
cues.description: A repeating search pattern while a device or live session connects.

cues.name: scanning
cues.label: Scanning
cues.description: A spatial sweep repeats while content or devices are discovered.

cues.name: streaming
cues.label: Streaming
cues.description: A quiet repeating flow while live data or media continues.

cues.name: play
cues.label: Play
cues.description: Media playback begins or resumes.

cues.name: pause
cues.label: Pause
cues.description: Media playback pauses at the current position.

cues.name: seek
cues.label: Seek
cues.description: The playback position moves to a new point.

cues.name: volume-change
cues.label: Volume change
cues.description: Playback loudness moves to a new level.

cues.name: skip-next
cues.label: Skip next
cues.description: Playback advances to the next item.

cues.name: skip-previous
cues.label: Skip previous
cues.description: Playback returns to the previous item.

cues.name: connect
cues.label: Connect
cues.description: A device, service, or live session becomes available.

cues.name: disconnect
cues.label: Disconnect
cues.description: A device, service, or live session goes offline.

cues.name: lock
cues.label: Lock
cues.description: Access closes or a protected state engages.

cues.name: unlock
cues.label: Unlock
cues.description: Access opens or a protected state disengages.

cues.name: wake
cues.label: Wake
cues.description: A device or dormant interface becomes active.

cues.name: sleep
cues.label: Sleep
cues.description: A device or interface enters a dormant state.

cues.name: reward
cues.label: Reward
cues.description: The user receives a small unit of value.

cues.name: level-up
cues.label: Level up
cues.description: Capability, rank, or progression increases.

cues.name: achievement
cues.label: Achievement
cues.description: A rare milestone deserves a fuller celebration.

cues.name: streak
cues.label: Streak
cues.description: Repeated participation extends an active streak.

cues.name: badge
cues.label: Badge
cues.description: A collectible distinction is awarded.

cues.name: bonus
cues.label: Bonus
cues.description: An unexpected extra reward is revealed.

cues.name: add-to-cart
cues.label: Add to cart
cues.description: An item enters a cart or pending order.

cues.name: remove-from-cart
cues.label: Remove from cart
cues.description: An item leaves a cart or pending order.

cues.name: checkout
cues.label: Checkout
cues.description: A cart advances into the payment flow.

cues.name: purchase
cues.label: Purchase
cues.description: A paid transaction or value exchange completes.

cues.name: coupon
cues.label: Coupon
cues.description: A discount or promotional code is accepted.

cues.name: refund
cues.label: Refund
cues.description: Value returns after a completed transaction.
